Let me outline the Trie node:

struct TrieNode {
    TrieNode* children[2] = {nullptr, nullptr};
    int count = 0;
};

The insert function would take a number and add it to the Trie. For each bit from 14 down to 0:

We check if the current node has a child for current_num_bit. If not, create a new node. Then move to that child and increment the count. 

The insert function:

void insert(TrieNode* root, int num) {
    TrieNode* node = root;
    for (int bit = 14; bit >= 0; --bit) {
        int b = (num >> bit) & 1;
        if (!node->children[b]) {
            node->children[b] = new TrieNode();
        }
        node = node->children[b];
        node->count++;
    }
}

The query function:

int query(TrieNode* root, int num, int x, int bit) {
    if (!root) return 0;
    if (bit < 0) return root->count; // All bits processed, XOR is 0 <= x?

    int current_x_bit = (x >> bit) & 1;
    int current_num_bit = (num >> bit) & 1;
    int total = 0;

    // Check for both children 0 and 1
    for (int child_bit = 0; child_bit <= 1; ++child_bit) {
        if (root->children[child_bit]) {
            int xor_bit = current_num_bit ^ child_bit;
            if (xor_bit < current_x_bit) {
                // All numbers in this subtree are valid
                total += root->children[child_bit]->count;
            } else if (xor_bit == current_x_bit) {
                // Need to check lower bits
                total += query(root->children[child_bit], num, x, bit - 1);
            }
            // else, xor_bit > current_x_bit, ignore
        }
    }
    return total;
}

void insert(TrieNode* root, int num) {
    TrieNode* node = root;
    for (int bit = 14; bit >= 0; --bit) {
        int b = (num >> bit) & 1;

The query function:

int query(TrieNode* root, int num, int x) {
    return query_helper(root, num, x, 14);
}

int query_helper(TrieNode* node, int num, int x, int bit) {
    if (!node) return 0;
    if (bit < 0) return node->count;

    int current_x_bit = (x >> bit) & 1;
    int current_num_bit = (num >> bit) & 1;
    int total = 0;

    for (int child_bit = 0; child_bit <= 1; ++child_bit) {
        if (node->children[child_bit]) {
            int xor_bit = current_num_bit ^ child_bit;
            if (xor_bit < current_x_bit) {
                total += node->children[child_bit]->count;
            } else if (xor_bit == current_x_bit) {
                total += query_helper(node->children[child_bit], num, x, bit - 1);
            }
        }
    }
    return total;
}

class Solution {
public:
    struct TrieNode {
        TrieNode* children[2];
        int count;
        TrieNode() : children{nullptr, nullptr}, count(0) {}
    };

    int countPairs(vector<int>& nums, int low, int high) {
        auto compute = [&](int x) -> int {
            TrieNode* root = new TrieNode();
            int total = 0;
            for (int num : nums) {
                total += query(root, num, x, 14);
                insert(root, num);
            }
            return total;
        };

        int high_count = compute(high);
        int low_minus_1_count = compute(low - 1);
        return high_count - low_minus_1_count;
    }

    void insert(TrieNode* root, int num) {
        TrieNode* node = root;
        for (int bit = 14; bit >= 0; --bit) {
            int b = (num >> bit) & 1;
            if (!node->children[b]) {
                node->children[b] = new TrieNode();
            }
            node = node->children[b];
            node->count++;
        }
    }

    int query(TrieNode* root, int num, int x, int bit) {
        return query_helper(root, num, x, bit);
    }

    int query_helper(TrieNode* node, int num, int x, int bit) {
        if (!node) return 0;
        if (bit < 0) return node->count;

        int current_x_bit = (x >> bit) & 1;
        int current_num_bit = (num >> bit) & 1;
        int total = 0;

        for (int child_bit = 0; child_bit <= 1; ++child_bit) {
            if (node->children[child_bit]) {
                int xor_bit = current_num_bit ^ child_bit;
                if (xor_bit < current_x_bit) {
                    total += node->children[child_bit]->count;
                } else if (xor_bit == current_x_bit) {
                    total += query_helper(node->children[child_bit], num, x, bit - 1);
                }
            }
        }
        return total;
    }
};

Let me outline the Trie node:

struct TrieNode {
    TrieNode* children[2] = {nullptr, nullptr};
    int count = 0;
};

The insert function would take a number and add it to the Trie. For each bit from 14 down to 0:

current_num_bit = (num >> bit) & 1 

We check if the current node has a child for current_num_bit. If not, create a new node. Then move to that child and increment the count. 

The insert function:

void insert(TrieNode* root, int num) {
    TrieNode* node = root;
    for (int bit = 14; bit >= 0; --bit) {
        int b = (num >> bit) & 1;
        if (!node->children[b]) {
            node->children[b] = new TrieNode();
        }
        node = node->children[b];
        node->count++;
    }
}

The query function:

int query(TrieNode* root, int num, int x, int bit) {
    if (!root) return 0;
    if (bit < 0) return root->count; // All bits processed, XOR is 0 <= x?

    int current_x_bit = (x >> bit) & 1;
    int current_num_bit = (num >> bit) & 1;
    int total = 0;

    // Check for both children 0 and 1
    for (int child_bit = 0; child_bit <= 1; ++child_bit) {
        if (root->children[child_bit]) {
            int xor_bit = current_num_bit ^ child_bit;
            if (xor_bit < current_x_bit) {
                // All numbers in this subtree are valid
                total += root->children[child_bit]->count;
            } else if (xor_bit == current_x_bit) {
                // Need to check lower bits
                total += query(root->children[child_bit], num, x, bit - 1);
            }
            // else, xor_bit > current_x_bit, ignore
        }
    }
    return total;
}

void insert(TrieNode* root, int num) {
    TrieNode* node = root;
    for (int bit = 14; bit >= 0; --bit) {
        int b = (num >> bit) & 1;
        if (!node->children[b]) {
            node->children[b] = new TrieNode();
        }
        node = node->children[b];
        node->count++;
    }
}

The query function:

int query(TrieNode* root, int num, int x) {
    return query_helper(root, num, x, 14);
}

int query_helper(TrieNode* node, int num, int x, int bit) {
    if (!node) return 0;
    if (bit < 0) return node->count;

    int current_x_bit = (x >> bit) & 1;
    int current_num_bit = (num >> bit) & 1;
    int total = 0;

    for (int child_bit = 0; child_bit <= 1; ++child_bit) {
        if (node->children[child_bit]) {
            int xor_bit = current_num_bit ^ child_bit;
            if (xor_bit < current_x_bit) {
                total += node->children[child_bit]->count;
            } else if (xor_bit == current_x_bit) {
                total += query_helper(node->children[child_bit], num, x, bit - 1);
            }
        }
    }
    return total;
}

Now, the code for the Solution class would be:

class Solution {
public:
    struct TrieNode {
        TrieNode* children[2];
        int count;
        TrieNode() : children{nullptr, nullptr}, count(0) {}
    };

    int countPairs(vector<int>& nums, int low, int high) {
        auto compute = [&](int x) -> int {
            TrieNode* root = new TrieNode();
            int total = 0;
            for (int num : nums) {
                total += query(root, num, x, 14);
                insert(root, num);
            }
            return total;
        };

        int high_count = compute(high);
        int low_minus_1_count = compute(low - 1);
        return high_count - low_minus_1_count;
    }

    void insert(TrieNode* root, int num) {
        TrieNode* node = root;
        for (int bit = 14; bit >= 0; --bit) {
            int b = (num >> bit) & 1;
            if (!node->children[b]) {
                node->children[b] = new TrieNode();
            }
            node = node->children[b];
            node->count++;
        }
    }

    int query(TrieNode* root, int num, int x, int bit) {
        return query_helper(root, num, x, bit);
    }

    int query_helper(TrieNode* node, int num, int x, int bit) {
        if (!node) return 0;
        if (bit < 0) return node->count;

        int current_x_bit = (x >> bit) & 1;
        int current_num_bit = (num >> bit) & 1;
        int total = 0;

        for (int child_bit = 0; child_bit <= 1; ++child_bit) {
            if (node->children[child_bit]) {
                int xor_bit = current_num_bit ^ child_bit;
                if (xor_bit < current_x_bit) {
                    total += node->children[child_bit]->count;
                } else if (xor_bit == current_x_bit) {
                    total += query_helper(node->children[child_bit], num, x, bit - 1);
                }
            }
        }
        return total;
    }
};
